name: No-Bake Rum-Raisin Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the rum and oats in a bowl; cover and set aside for one hour.
2. Add all remaining ingredients except granulated sugar to the bowl with the rum and oats mixture. Cover and refrigerate for one hour.
3. Form small balls of the mixture, about 1-inch in diameter.
4. Roll each ball in granulated sugar until generously coated.
5. Store the balls in an airtight container at room temperature for up to ten days or freeze them for three months before serving.
